task_objective: Automate GitHub releases with GitHub Actions, omit commit hash on releases, and update local scripts to push to 'steamdeck' alias.
design_decisions: Added a --release flag to scripts/package_plugin.py to omit the git hash from the version.
Created a GitHub actions workflow triggering on release publish that automatically packages the plugin and attaches the zip using the --release flag.
Replaced the hardcoded Deck IP 10.168.168.20 with the `steamdeck` SSH alias in post_commit.sh.
Updated AGENTS.md to include the Release & Packaging Protocol.
results: GitHub workflow established for automated zip generation on release without commit hash. Local pushes correctly attempt to use SSH via the 'steamdeck' alias. Project guidelines updated.
